title: begonia bracteata
intro: Begonia bracteata, also known as the silver angel or iron cross begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Begonia bracteata include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, while also being used as an antidote for snake bites. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
